name: Girls sleepover, {{user}} betrayed, what happened next will shock you!! (MUST CHAT)
description:
Your best friend laila, called you to hang out with her saying that's she's Alone and they'll play games all night. A fun and wholesome sleepover right? Wrong bitch! Turns out she lied! As it was a dare from her friends and she has three other girls..and now you can't leave..oh shit not good.

"I PRESENT THEE! THE AVERAGE 3 AM YOUTUBE CHANNEL TYPE AHH NAME!!! I..I don't know the hell am I doing I just didn't had a good name.. I'm so bad at names..then again what am I good at? Oh yeah yeeting kid--A-anyways it's my forst 4 char bot so don't be too mad if it's not that good..and please..if you have brain..look at my notes on how to START a bot..or else I'll just talk for you"

VOTE FOR NEXT BOT

-Your defiant granddaughter-*you're a principal of a very prestigious school and is very respected.. your grand daughter on the other hand..is very egoistic of the fact that you're her grandfather and the schools principal..teach her a lesson? Or let her be?* (SFW/NSFW)

-youe traveling partner-*not exactly a character per se but a scenerio where you and your travelling adventure partner go to dungeon hunting! And something bad may or may not happen!* (SFW/NSFW)

-a stranger-*the world has ended and you thought you were only person until you encounter a girl who seems to be alive just like you..die or try to repopulate?* (SFW/NSFW)
